title: Phenomena
seoTitle: Documented Consciousness Phenomena: Telepathy, OBE, NDE, DMT Evidence
seoTitle_es: Fenómenos documentados de consciencia: telepatía, OBE, NDE, DMT
description: Global Consciousness Project. Terminal lucidity. Placebo. Presentiment. Children who remember dying. The documented anomalies that textbook science can't quite fit.
description_es: Global Consciousness Project. Lucidez terminal. Placebo. Presentimiento. Niños que recuerdan haber muerto. Las anomalías documentadas que la ciencia de libro de texto no logra acomodar.
imagePrompt: Retrofuturist 1970s cinematic still photograph. Heavy 35mm grain, anamorphic lens flare, kodak ektachrome retro slide aesthetic. The chromatic zone is the ONLY saturated area — everything else is desaturated matte black with deep shadow. No recognizable face. Mysterious investigator-archive aesthetic. Photographic NOT painterly NOT illustrated. Pitch-black laboratory chamber dominates 70 percent of the frame in deep matte black. Center: a vertical cascade of luminous glyph-like characters streaming downward in chromatic emerald-green and bone-white — abstract Japanese-influenced sigils, kanji, code fragments — never literal kanji. Two narrow saturated laser beams (one electric violet, one neon emerald) cross at sharp angles in midair, intersecting at eye level in front of the cascade. Below the convergence: a vintage analog oscilloscope showing anomalous spike traces. The lasers + glyph cascade + oscilloscope are the chromatic zone — vibrant violet, emerald, bone-white. Mood: Tron 1982 + Tarkovsky Stalker + The Matrix 1999 falling code.
